title: Pan-Seared Salmon with Norweigan Wrap
description: A simple and delicious recipe featuring pan-seared salmon served with a crispy Norwegian wrap.
instructions: 2. Season the salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
3. Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Sear the salmon for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
5. Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
6. Meanwhile, toast the Norwegian wraps in the oven for 2-3 minutes, or until crispy.
7. Assemble the wraps by placing a piece of salmon on each, followed by a spoonful of spring mix and pickled red onion.
